meaning: adj.家庭的,国内的,与人共处的,驯服的
examples: It was a scene of such domestic bliss.
The police were called to sort out a domestic.
We spent the whole evening discussing domestic trivia.
Out of those 70% were domestic visitors and 30% were from overseas, the report said.
Frontier Airlines has grabbed nearly 20% of domestic traffic in Denver, a United hub.
